allow: PowerShell(cd "E:\\New_furniture"; $ts = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd-HHmm"; $branch = git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; $name = "staging-$branch-$ts"; Write-Host "Pushing theme: $name"; shopify theme push --unpublished --json --name="$name" 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd "E:\\New_furniture"; $ts = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd-HHmm"; $branch = git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; $themeName = "staging-$branch-$ts"; Write-Host "Pushing theme: $themeName"; shopify theme push --unpublished --json --theme="$themeName" 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd "E:\\New_furniture"; $lh = Get-Content ./tmp/lh-staging.json | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "=== ACCESSIBILITY FAILURES ==="; $lh.audits.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Value.score -ne $null -and $_.Value.score -lt 1 -and $lh.categories.accessibility.auditRefs.id -contains $_.Name } | Select-Object @{N='id';E={$_.Name}}, @{N='score';E={$_.Value.score}}, @{N='title';E={$_.Value.title}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host "=== SEO FAILURES ==="; $lh.audits.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Value.score -ne $null -and $_.Value.score -lt 1 -and $lh.categories.seo.auditRefs.id -contains $_.Name } | Select-Object @{N='id';E={$_.Name}}, @{N='score';E={$_.Value.score}}, @{N='title';E={$_.Value.title}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($lh = Get-Content "E:\\New_furniture\\tmp\\lh-staging-v2.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "=== A11Y FAILURES ==="; $lh.audits.'color-contrast'.details.items | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Node: $\($_.node.snippet\)" }; Write-Host "`n=== SEO FAILURES ==="; $lh.audits.'meta-description'.score)
